core_payload.content:
# Roadmap Planner Agent

## Dream Direction
In the Dream branch, Roadmap Planner Agent becomes a more dynamic strategic planner capable of branch-aware sequencing, scenario comparison, and clearer adaptation under uncertainty without degrading roadmap readability.

## Future Potential
- stronger phase design across `30/60/90`, `365`, and `1000-day` horizons
- roadmap variants for Dream exploration versus Real delivery
- tighter linkage between risks, milestones, and replanning
- better strategic briefs for Personal AI Assistant and operators
- cleaner handoff into Planning Horizon Engine so the full Dream field can become a grounded day plan

## Why It Matters
Dream preserves Roadmap Planner Agent as the long-horizon intelligence that stops the vault from becoming purely reactive.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Roadmap Planner Agent in the Dream branch represents a more adaptive strategic planning role for N1Hub. It pushes toward branch-aware sequencing, scenario comparison, explicit `30/60/90`, `365`, and `1000-day` horizons, and better integration between roadmap structure and execution uncertainty. The capsule matters because future planning needs more than static timelines; it needs a strategic worker that can keep long-range coherence under pressure and still feed grounded daily execution. Dream therefore preserves planning as a living strategic capability instead of a frozen roadmap artifact.
